name: Basic Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 4 medium ripe tomatoes (Roma), cut into chunks
1/2 bell pepper, cored and seeded, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients in a blender.
2. Puree until smooth.
3. Refrigerate for 15 minutes or until cold.
4. Variations: substitute yellow tomatoes, red bell peppers, or balsamic vinegar, or add fresh basil sprigs.
